response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure embedded systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web and GIS contexts; while they have one brief C++ role from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse tech stacks
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven systems and distributed architectures
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or embedded automation systems
No evidence of hands-on work with message brokers, MQTT, REST in industrial contexts, or multi-threaded C++ systems
